titleStmt.title: SII 26.347: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 347. (A.R. No. 328 of 1909.) KŪVAM, TIRUVALLORE TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: North and west walls of the same shrine.
This inscription contains the praśasti of the king commencing with tirumādu puviyeṉṉum, etc.

It records a sale of land in Kōṭṭūr alias Chōḻavichchādirach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Kaṉṟūr-nāḍu in Maṇaviṟ-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam by the Mahāsabhai of the place for a sum of 160 kāśu. The land was intended for digging through it a feeder-channel to the Tiribuvanamādēvipperiyēri of Kūvam alias Madhurāntaka-nallūr in the same nāḍu, kōṭṭam and maṇḍalam. It contains a detailed description of the manner and course in which the channel should be dug.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumātu puviyenṉum perumātaṟiruvar tammāteviyāka mitoḷir veṇkuṭai Uyarttit tiṇkalipeyarttu tanciṟutātaiyākiya Eṟivalik kaṅkai koṇṭa coḻaṉaip poṅkayalirumuṭi coḻaṉenṟum perumuraṭtiṉṟiruttampiyar tammuḷ veṉṟi keraḷamummaṭicoḻaṉait temmuṉai Aṭutiṟaṟ coḻapāṇṭiyaneṉṟum koḻimaṉṟoṭu kaṭal viracoḻaṉait tolpukaṭ karikālacoḻaneṉṟum perutoḻil vāḷvalittaṭakkai maturān=takaṉaic coḻakaṅkaneṉṟuc cavottiyarājaneṉṟun=tayarak keraḷat tanṟiruvuḷat taruḷoṭu karutu kātalaruḷat talampukaḻ rājen=tiracoḻaṉai Uttamacoḻaneṉṟu tottaṇi mukaiyviḻalaṅkalamuṭi koṇṭacoḻaṉai yikal vicaiyālaiyaneṉṟum pukarmukatte muyarkaḷir
ṟuccoḻakeraḷaṉai virācilaiccoḻa keraḷaneṉṟu n=tiṇṭiṟṟa kaṭāraṅkoṇṭacoḻa janakarājaneṉṟuṅ kaḻalpaṭikaṇṭa palapukaḻ muṭikoṇṭa coḻaṉaic cuntaracoḻaneṉṟuñ centamiṭa piṭiyaliraṭṭapāṭikkoṇṭacoḻaṉait tolpuvi Āḷuṭaiccoḻakaṉnakucciyarājaneṉṟu maṉṉutaṉ kātalar kātalar tammuḷ metaku katirāṅ kaṉaikaḻal maturān=taka kanaiṟavelpaṭaic coḻavallaneṉṟu maānaccilaikkai Orāṉaic cevakaṉai nirupentiracoḻaneṉṟum parumaṇi �ḷiṉuḷikalveṭṭeḻuntu cenṟoṇṭiṟa liraṭṭamaṇṭalameyti natikaḷumnāṭum patikaḷumaneka maḻittaṉavavaneṉṉu moḻip poruḷ keṭṭu veka veñcaḷukki Āhavamallaṉ paripavanekkiteṉṟe tireḻuntu cepparun=tirantaka ko
ppattakavaiyilluṭaṉ ṟetireṉṟamar tuṭaṅkiya poḻutavan ceñcaramārikaḷ kuñciramukattilun=taṉṟiruttuṭaiyiluṅ kuṉṟukaḷappakaciluttaikkavun taṉṉuṭaṉ kaḷiṟeṟiya toṭukaḻal virar maṭiyavum vakaiyātorutaṉiyanekam porupaṭai vaḻaṅkimoya maṭumar caḷukki tampi cayaciṅkaṉum porppulakkecariyuntarāt tacapaṉmaṉum māna maṉṉavaril maṇṭalicokayaṉum māṇavaṇpukaḻāḷumaraiyaṉum teṉivar maṭṭaviḻalaṅkal moṭṭayaṉu n=taṭṭi ṇili Aracarai viṇṇakatteṟṟi vaṉṉiyarevaṉum vayappaṭaittuttaṉuṅ koṉṉavil Ipaṭaikkuṇṭappaṉumeṉṟi varuṭanañciya caḷukki kulakulaintu talaimayir virittuveṉṉuṟa neḷittu minṉuṟa ṉokkikkāla paṟin=toṭimel kaṭalpāyatturat
tiya porutac cerukkaḷattavani Icatturuppayaṅkarak karapattira mutalapattiracāti pakaṭṭaracanekamum veṭṭu niṇapparikaḷum Oṭṭakaniraiyum varākavelkoṭi rājapariccinṉamum Oppilacattiyavvaiyuñ sahāsavaiyu menṟivar mutalteviyar kuḻāmum pāvaiyariṭṭa mumeṉaiyariṭṭamumenaiyaṉ piṟavu muṉaivaiyiṟkoṇṭu vijaiyabhiṣegam paṇṇit teṉṟicaivaraippil porppari naṭāttikkārkkuṭalilaṅkaiyil miṭaṟpaṭaikkaliṅkar manviracalā� lakkiratiravilaṅkiya Ilaṅkaik kiṟaivan māpparaṇan kātalariruvarai kaḷattiṭaip piṭittu māpperum pukaḻmika vaḷartta kopparakecaripanmarāna Uṭaiyār śrīrājentradevarkku yāṇṭu Aiñcāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu maṇaviṟ
koṭṭattuk kaṉṟūrṉāṭṭu koṭṭurāṉa coḻaviccātiraccaturvetimaṅkalattu mahāsabhaiyom pūmivilaiyāvaṇakkaiy yeḻuttu Ikkoṭṭattu Iṉṉāṭṭukkūvamāna maturān=takanallūr Iruṅkaṇūr kiḻa vaṉpakkalṉāṅkaḷ nūṟṟaṟupatukkoṇṭu tirupuvanamātevipperiyerikku nirpāya vāykkāl koṭupoka nilam viṟṟukkuṭutta paricāvatu tāmakovil neriyaṉmaṅkalattellaiyiliṭṭa kalaṅka ku Eṅkaḷ minavamuven=taveḷān talaippeḻaiyetalaivaiyākap paṟṟuk kiḻakku nokkippaḻaṅkāle pontu kārampicceṭṭuttāmotiraveṭapac comāci pulattiṟ teṉmelai mulaikkeyiḻiyak kāluṅ
karaiyum Uṭpaṭa śrīpātaṅkolāl Ilaṅku Aiṅkol nilam peṟṟu Icceṟuviṟ teṉmelai mulaikkeya Icceṟuvil viḷainilattiley teṟkaṭaiya nāṟ kolum tenvarappile yoru kolumāka Aiṅ kalat toṭu mitanteṉnarukey kiḻakkunokki yiḻintu kārampicceṭṭuntāḻi perumāṉ kiramavittaṉ kollaiyai naṭuviṭṭu vaṭakiḻakku ṉokki Iḻintu nalvaḻunūruṭaiyāṉ ceṟuviṟ teṉmai Icceṟuvil viḷainilattiley teṉṉaruke yivvakalattoṭu miḻi
ntu Icceṟuvil vaṭakiḻ mulaikkeyiḻintu vaṭakiḻakku nokkippontu tiruvaṭip peṟuñceṟuviṉ teṉmelaimulaiyiṟ periya ceṭiyiṉ vaṭavarukey vantu It tiruvaṭip peruñceṟuvai naṭuvukottuppoyi nilatti naṭuviṭṭuppoyikkollaiyil vaṭakkil mārvantiya śrīkollaicceṟuviṟ tenkiḻ mulaikkeyiḻintu I
taṉ kiḻaiceṟuvin teṉṉarukey kiḻakku nokki yiḻintu Itan kiḻakku tiṅkaḷurellaiyuṟ Ivvakalattoṭuñ ceyvitāka vaṭakiḻakku nokkikkalli nirpāyccikkoḷḷap peṟuvatākavum muncuṭṭina minavan muventaveḷāṉ nāṭṭumeḻai A ṟṟaviṭattu niṉṟum Ikkaṭaiyaḷavum varakkaraikkuṅkālukkum vilaṅku Aiṅkol kalam śrīpatakkolāl peṟṟu Ikkāl kallikka kaḷākavum Ikkāluṅ karaiyum pona nilattukku sabhaiyome Iṟaiyiṟuppatākavum Icaintu Ivvaiṅkolukkum Iṟaiyiḻicci Iṟaiyivi vāykkālākavum Ivarkaḷil vāykkāl cuṭṭina Aiṅkolukkun talaiyuṟkaṭaiyuṟ Ivvaiṅkolkalattukkum Iṟaikā
ṭṭappeṟātomākavum Ipparicu Icaintu Iṟaiiḻicci Ikkācu nūṟṟarupatuṅ kaikkoṇṭu viṟṟukkoṭuttom Ivvāykkālānupoṉa nīril miṉavan muven=taveḷān vāykkāl Aṭaiyātey nirppāyap peṟuvatākavum ṭa nirum vilaṅkaṭaiyātey pāycciyum Iṟaiccum koḷḷappeṟuvomākavum vilaṅkaṭaikkap peṟātomākavumippaṭi Icaintu vāykkāl kalli nirpaāyccik koḷḷappeṟuvārkaḷā kācu nūṟṟaṟupatuṅ kaiyyileyaṟakkoṇṭu viṟṟuk kuṭuttom Itukku veṟu poruḷ māvaṟutip poruṭ celavolai kāṭṭuka veṉnappeṟātomākavum Ipparicu Icaintu vilaiyaṟakkoṇṭu viṟṟukkuṭuttom Ippaṭi
Ivvilakṣaṇattiṉpaṭiye taṅkaḷūril śrīmaturāntakaviṇṇakarāḻvār koyilile kalveṭṭikkoḷḷap peṟuvārākavum Icaintu viṟṟukkuṭuttom coḻaviccātiraccaruppetimaṅkalattu mahāsabhaiyom Ivarkaḷ paṇik ṉeṉṟu Eḻuttu muṭittāṉ kārampicceṭṭuḷa nayakkiramavittaṉ . § Eḻuttiṭṭār poṟpuṟattu mātavakkiramavittaṉ—veṟpuṟattu śrīkraṣṇa(ku)kiramavittaṉ—kārampicceṭṭumātava kkiramavittaṉ Oruvakaṇṭi mātavavikkiramavittaṉ—poṟattu Iḷaiyakaṇimātavakkiramavittaṉ—veṟpuṟattu Aṟikumārakkiramavittaṉ—kārampicceṭṭuc cirāmakkiramavittaṉ—kārampicceṭṭut
tiruvaraṅkak kiramavittaṉ makaṉ kecavakkiramavittan Iruṅkaṇṭi ciriḷaṅkokkiramavittaṉ—ca kecavakkiramavittaṉ makaṉ niṇṭayakkiramavittaṉ—kārampicceṭṭut tāḻipaṭṭaṉ—vaṅkippuṟattu cirāmakkiramavittaṉ—veṟpuṟattu Akkumārakki vayaṉ—civabrāhmaṇaṉ kāśyapan maticūtapaṭṭaṉ—āyiratteṇmapaṭṭaṉ—caṇṭeśvaranampi—veḷḷāḷan neṟkumipai Uṭaiyāṉ periyāṉa maṇikaṇṭi—pūtuḻāṉa moṭaṉ māte ṇṭa vācutevaṉ tankūvattilerikkuppāya viyaṟṟuvittāna Ārukkum perāvaruḷa main=taṉ Uttamacoḻaṉ peyarāṟ kār māṟiluṅ kāvākkāl .§ tantamaiyan n=toruttamacoḻan taṉ peyarāl Enṟunikaḻa kūvatterikku nankamaittāna vellātāṉivāḻ vayiramekan taṉ kaipol purappatoru kāl ...§
Digital edition of SII 26.347 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
